sample_posts.text:
Ryan Watkins: Crypto Is Entering Its Biggest Adoption Phase
> Ryan Watkins argues blockchains are becoming the global API for money and finance, set to power stablecoins, tokenized equities, perps, prediction markets, onchain credit, and more.
> Bringing crypto to the masses inclusive of humans and agents, with effort to come from both crypto-native apps (e.g Phantom and Fomo) and incumbents like Robinhood and Stripe.
> “Time to look past any month-to-month volatility and focus on the bigger picture unfolding over coming quarters and years…Time to lock in.”
Source:
https://x.com/RyanWatkins_/s

tweet.text:
Blockchains are a global API for money and finance.

We’re going to plug this API into every app where it makes sense over the coming years and bring crypto to the masses inclusive of humans and agents.

Stablecoin payments + savings, tokenized assets, onchain credit markets, perps for everything, prediction markets… the list goes on.

All these products are composable, so builders will only be limited by their imaginations on what this could all look like.

Some efforts will be homegrown like Phantom and Fomo.

Others will be established players like Robinhood and Stripe plugging it in and ch

sample_posts.text:
Sky Protocol hits record $419M annualized gross revenue –
Link
Sky Protocol's annualized gross revenue run rate reached a record $419.08 million in June 2026. Cumulative yield to sUSDS holders exceeded $250 million, and Sky Reserves grew to $82.5 million, up $33.7 million since March.
Matters because:
The numbers point to strong DeFi fundamentals and sustainable yield generation.

tweet.text:
Sky Protocol's Annualized Gross Revenue Run Rate Hits Record $419M

Sky Frontier Foundation said in its June 2026 financial and operational update that Sky Protocol's annualized gross revenue run rate reached a record $419.08 million, based on the last three Monthly Settlement Cycles. Cumulative yield accrued to sUSDS holders through the Sky Savings Rate has surpassed $250 million since inception, while Sky Reserves closed June at $82.5 million, up $33.7 million since March. Grove, one of Sky's Prime Agents, launched its GROVE governance token in June. Separately, a fixed-yield product for sUS

sample_posts.text:
The Most Underrated Token Type: “Arcade Tokens”
> Arcade tokens are digital currencies intended for spending within their associated application ecosystems, with supply and demand flexibly managed to maintain price stability.
> They enable builders to print and provision value within a digital economy which can incentivize user behavior, bootstrap early growth, and generate network effects, without relying on external capital or speculative demand. Arcade tokens can power digital economies at scale.
👇
Source:
https://a16zcrypto.substack.com/p/the-most-underrated-token-type

Gauntlet raises $125 million from SBI Holdings –
Link
DeFi risk management platform Gauntlet secured $125M in exclusive financing from SBI Holdings. The deal came in above its 2022 Series B valuation of roughly $1B.
Matters because:
It shows continued institutional demand for DeFi risk infrastructure and vault curation.
